description: Create or edit images using AI with customizable quality, aspect ratio, and format
generate-images-using-the-nano-banana-pr: Submits image generation request and returns session ID
the-text-prompt-describing-the-image-to-: Text prompt describing the desired image

continuously-polls-the-image-generation-: Polls status until completion and returns final images
the-session-id-returned-from-the-image-g: Session ID from generation or editing request
test-flow-for-the-ai-image-generator-sub: Test flow for AI image generator subflow

array-of-image-urls-to-edit-1-to-3-image: Array of image URLs to edit (1-3 images)
output-format-of-the-edited-image: Output file format (PNG, JPEG, WebP, JPG)
session-id-for-the-image-editing-request: Session ID for tracking editing progress
edit-images-using-nano-banana-pro-with-a: Edits images from URLs with automatic polling
test-flow-for-nano-banana-image-edit-sub: Test flow for image editing subflow
